name: Best Butterscotch Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Cookies: Preheat oven to 300°F. In a medium bowl, using a whisk, mix together flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, using an electric mixer, beat together sugar and butter until a grainy paste forms. Scrape down sides of the bowl when necessary.
Add eggs and vanilla extract, and beat on medium speed until soft and lumpy. Add the flour mixture and chopped walnuts; mix on low just until combined. Do not overmix. Drop rounded tablespoons of cookie dough 2 inches apart onto an ungreased baking sheet. Place one whole walnut half in the center of each cookie.
Bake for 25 minutes or until cookies begin to turn brown at the edges. Transfer to a cool, flat surface.
Glaze: Melt caramels and cream in a small saucepan over low heat and stir until smooth. Remove from heat. Drizzle cooled cookies with glaze in interesting patterns.
